case_title: GEICO GENERAL INCURANCE COMPANY VS. ARM TRUCKING INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-13-2017 CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
